description: Baseline: 12 failures (4 failed + 8 errors). 4090 passed. Categories: 9 include+interrupt, 1 render syntax, 2 dynamic include
Fix render_static_name_only: let SyntaxError propagate from compile block so liquid-spec runner detects it as parse_error. +1 passed (4091)
Fix dynamic include for/with iteration: add __for__ support + array iteration for with clause in generate_dynamic_partial. +2 passed (4093)

100% spec coverage! Fix include+interrupt propagation (check scope.has_interrupt? after partial calls, throw to caller's loop), guard WRITE_VAR/WRITE_VAR_PATH with interrupt check. 12→0 failures, 4102 passed, complexity 1000/1000
Skip IL passes 1,2,3,5 for structured compiler. Parse 0.9% faster but breaks 362 tests in main suite - passes needed for general templates.
Fast-path fold_const_ops: skip non-constant opcodes with hash lookup instead of const_value() method call. No regression in main suite (same 6 pre-existing failures).
Use RubyVM::InstructionSequence.compile instead of eval for generated code. 17% faster eval for large templates. Parse 5349→5310µs. No regression in main suite.
Second run to confirm ISeq improvement. render 84895 (noise), parse 5294 (0.8% better than original baseline).

Shorten generated code variable names (__output__→_O, __scope__→_S, __current_file__→_F). 8.8% smaller generated code, 1.3% faster parse (5310→5241µs). Render 84322 (best yet, likely noise). No regression in main suite.
Shorten more generated variable names (for-loop vars, temps). 14.9% total code reduction vs original. Parse 5241→5232µs. No regression.
Pre-compute pass flags as local booleans in fused_peephole to avoid Set#include? per instruction. Parse 5230→5121µs (2.1% improvement). No regression.
Confirmation run for cumulative optimizations. Parse 5115µs (4.2% below baseline), render 84665µs (0.4% below baseline).
Short method aliases for generated code (_H.lf, _H.oa, _H.cf, _H.lp). 21.2% total code size reduction from baseline. Parse 5130µs (3.9% below baseline). No regression.
Add short aliases for compare, contains, to_iterable, slice_collection, valid_integer, bracket_lookup. Marginal further code size reduction. Parse 5127µs. No regression.
Confirmation run. parse 5129, render 85000. No new changes.
